name: Fudge Truffle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. Melt the chocolate chips in a heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
3. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Add the sweetened condensed milk and vanilla, beating until smooth.
5. Incorporate the melted chocolate and eggs into the mixture.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pie crust.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 5 minutes, or until the center is set.
Yum!
